task_option_results.recommendation: Use the two-task advisory setup when possible: driver behavior as NORMAL vs AGGRESSIVE, and road condition as NORMAL_ROAD vs ROAD_ANOMALY. It is more defensible under strict grouped validation. Keep the single multiclass model as the simplest fallback. ROAD_ANOMALY remains a road-condition advisory, not driver behavior.

skipped_by_source_reason.reason: skipped: downloaded files do not provide a verified folder-to-label mapping; Data in Brief describes Day-*S/*R as trip timing folders, not class labels
